description_long: This is a modern, single-story residential house set within a fenced yard featuring a spacious green lawn and several outdoor amenities. The house has a flat roof and large, rectangular windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The front yard is landscaped with a row of flowering trees, and the backyard includes a trampoline, a play area, and outdoor seating with umbrellas. The structure is primarily white with some gray accents, and the windows are framed in black. The house includes a garage, visible from the front, and a swimming pool area on one side. The overall design emphasizes open, airy spaces and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped yard, and multiple outdoor amenities including a pool and play area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, a row of flowering trees, and the expansive front lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard amenities, including a trampoline, play area, and outdoor seating with umbrellas.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, patio area, and large windows opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the open green lawn, trampoline, and the rear facade of the house with additional windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple modern door, no porch, flanked by large windows and a paved path, accented by flowering trees.
